DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF BY PROCESS SERVER, PHILLIP ERKENBRACK.

NEW MAILING ADDRESS FOR PLAINTIFF, FILED: 136 TERESITA WAY, LOS GATOS, CA 95032.

RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURN UNABLE TO FORWARD.
